person.name: Ralph de Vernon
person.alternateName: Ralph de Vernon Rector of Hanwell
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Ralph Vernon, de jure Baron of Shipbrook was the son of Sir Richard de Vernon and brother of Warren (Warin?) Vernon, who died in France and his estates were split between his daughters and his brother Ralph. Ralph at the time was a priest and Rector of Hanwell.

On becoming de jure Baron of Shipbrook, Ralph Vernon set aside his vow of celibacy and produced a son with Cecilia Crew, there was rumoured to be no marriage certificate. He left further issue by Maud Grosvenor. Ralph's son, also Ralph (born 1241), was reputed to have lived to such an extraordinary age that he earned the nickname "The Old Liver."

Ralph de VERNON held the royal title of Rector of Hanwell, but quietly set aside his vow of celibacy and made a match with Cecilia CREW (Lysons says there was no marriage certificate), and became the father of a son. This Ralph wrested half the baronial estate of Shipbrook from his nieces, children of his brother Warine VERNON, becoming de jure Baron of Shipbrook (magnate, not member of peerage). He died in 1270.

zh.Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾希布盧可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Vernon於大約1205年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook29歲，母親Auda Malbank32歲。他於1239年與Cecilia Crew在英國英格蘭爾希布盧可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1270年在英國爾希布盧可享年66歲。

zh-hans.Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰爾希布盧可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Vernon于大约1205年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook29岁，母亲Auda Malbank32岁。他于1239年与Cecilia Crew在英国英格兰爾希布盧可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1270年在英国爾希布盧可享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Vernon was born about 1205, in Cheshire, England, his father, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, was 29 and his mother, Auda Malbank, was 32. He married Cecilia Crew in 1239, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1270, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Vernon est né environ 1205, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Auda Malbank, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Crew en 1239, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1270, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Vernon um 1205 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook 29 und seine Mutter Auda Malbank 32. Er hat 1239 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Cecilia Crew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1270 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Vernon è nato il circa 1205 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Auda Malbank, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia Crew nel 1239, nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1270, nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Vernonが約1205年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrookは29歳，母Auda Malbankは32歳であった。1239年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークでCecilia Crewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1270年にイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Vernon(이)가 대략 1205년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Auda Malbank(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 시브룩에서 Cecilia Crew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Auda Malbank, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia Crew em 1239, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1270, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Vernon родился около 1205 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Auda Malbank, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Crew в 1239 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1270 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Vernon nació aproximadamente 1205, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Auda Malbank, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Cecilia Crew en 1239, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1270, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
